SCOUT.name: RECON SPREAD
SCOUT.description: Maximum coverage — agents spread across all zones for broad intelligence gathering

SCOUT.name: SHADOW LINE
SCOUT.description: Agents positioned behind the target zone — observe without engaging

SCOUT.name: OVERWATCH
SCOUT.description: One forward scout, rest positioned high for full visibility

SCOUT.name: LANE SWEEP
SCOUT.description: Each agent assigned a vertical lane — systematic coverage left to right

DEFENSE.name: ZONE DEFENSE
DEFENSE.description: Agents cover zones not targets — protect areas of responsibility

DEFENSE.name: MAN TO MAN
DEFENSE.description: Each agent assigned to a specific target — direct coverage, no gaps

DEFENSE.name: PHALANX
DEFENSE.description: Tight formation — agents clustered for mutual support and overlapping coverage

DEFENSE.name: CASTLE
DEFENSE.description: Primary protected in center, others form defensive perimeter

OFFENSE.name: BLITZ
OFFENSE.description: All agents forward — maximum pressure on target, sprint execution

OFFENSE.name: PINCER
OFFENSE.description: Split force attacks from two sides — surround and converge on target

OFFENSE.name: WEDGE
OFFENSE.description: Primary at point, others behind in V — break through defenses

OFFENSE.name: GANK
OFFENSE.description: One agent holds attention, others rotate in from unexpected angles

OFFENSE.name: SIEGE
OFFENSE.description: Surround target completely — sustained pressure from all directions
OFFENSE.source: Military — siege warfare / WoW raid positioning
